Log transcript for flight arriving at BLR (Bengaluru). Flight deck reported a minor telemetry mismatch in the Pneumatics unit. Cross-examination confirms the issue isolates directly to the Bleed Air Pressure Regulator (Part ID: BPR-101). Replacement component must be sourced to avoid an active Aircraft-on-Ground (AOG) event.
